conservative.name: Empathic Warp
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
Target within long range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: The target's stance becomes the opposite of this current stance, at the same depth. If this is impossible, for example because his opposite stance track is not as long as his current depth, then he suffers 1 stress for each space of stance track adjustment he is unable to fulfill
As above, and you may then adjust the target's stance 1 space

bane.description: On your next action, you convert no dice into stance dice, regardless of your current stance

chaosStar.description: All characters within close range suffer 1 stress (including you)

reckless.name: Empathic Warp
reckless.requirements:
4 Power
Target within long range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: The target's stance becomes the opposite of this current stance, at the same depth. If this is impossible, for example because his opposite stance track is not as long as his current depth, then he suffers 1 stress for each space of stance track adjustment he is unable to fulfill
As above, and the target adds to his dice pool during his next action

bane.description: On your next action, you convert no dice into stance dice, regardless of your current stance

chaosStar.description: All characters within close range suffer 1 stress (including you)
